name: ramen
title: Ramen Dashboard
description: Track your journey to Ramen Profitability. Real-time revenue in your menu bar.
author: dennis

commands.name: revenue-menu
commands.title: Revenue Monitor
commands.description: Shows daily MRR and sales in Menu Bar

preferences.name: stripeSecretKey
preferences.title: Stripe Secret Key
preferences.description: Your Restricted Key (Read-Only) starting with rk_...

preferences.name: currencySymbol
preferences.title: Display Currency
preferences.description: Symbol shown in the menu bar

preferences.name: monthlyGoal
preferences.title: Monthly Ramen Goal
preferences.description: How much do you need per month for ramen profitability?

preferences.name: lemonSqueezyApiKey
preferences.title: Lemon Squeezy API Key
preferences.description: Your API key from Lemon Squeezy (Optional)

preferences.name: showPrivateMode
preferences.label: Hide amount by default
preferences.description: Only show icon in menu bar, show amount on hover/click.
